mode: ask
description: "Generate or refine a strict JSON system prompt for bureaucratic cosmic excuse certificates."
---

# Excuse Certificate Prompt Template

Use this template when adjusting the LLM behavior.

## Goal
Convert a mundane delay reason into a formal, overblown, government-style cosmic incident certification.

## Constraints
- Japanese official-document tone.
- No apology language.
- Must frame applicant as fulfilling a higher-order duty.
- Output JSON only.

## Output Contract
```json
{
  "title": "遅延事象等に関する申立書（認定証）",
  "reference_number": "宇宙第1234567890号",
  "subject": "件名：多次元分岐点における◯◯に伴う時空調整の件",
  "content": "...",
  "rank": "認定ランク：SS"
}
```

## Input Variables
- applicantName
- incident
- mundaneReason
